programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Mike and Eamon worry a teen could have life-changing head injuries after a fall and seizure at school. Steve and Jade deliver essential care for an incredible woman whose deteriorating health is on a knife edge.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Steve and Jade carry a fabulous range of painkillers, but their motorbike crash victim doesn’t seem to want any. Father-Daughter team Teagan and Brett are called to a potential heart attack, but their patient is only in his teens.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
